texto: Maybe love was just an illusion anyway, like jigsaw puzzles that looked like a picture or a painting from a distance. But the closer you got, the more visible the cracks. Wasn’t until you shined a light on it that the illusion fell apart.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Erin McLellan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Maybe love was just an illusion anyway, like jigsaw puzzles that looked like a picture or a paint…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, love-quotes, illusion pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
